opinion.h4: CORSA ET AL. v. TAWES ET AL., CONSTITUTING THE COMMISSION OF TIDEWATER FISHERIES OF MARYLAND, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF MARYLAND. No. 416. Decided November 12, 1957.
opinion.p: Ambler H. Moss and William H. Price for appellants.
C. Ferdinand Sybert, Attorney General of Maryland, Charles B. Reeves, Jr., Assistant Attorney General, Alexander Harvey, II and Edward S. Digges, Special Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
